So, I’m once again dedicated to having her guide me through the  journey to more beautiful healthy skin. I must say, it takes commitment, consistency, and of course it can be costly, but the reward is worth it!
I trust only Dr. Austin with my skin and I have seen many derms over the years. I highly, highly recommend her.","Images":null,"When":""}]

They are very professional, friendly and wonderful to work with. I look forward to every appointment I have with them, I just love them both!  I am very grateful for all they’ve done for me.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jessica Houle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXAddi86POC-MtIK7xpen_OvvKSdr3nR2Ftup6WqboRRxkQVyA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I cannot say enough incredible things about my experience with Dr. Mo and the entire team at CSI. I underwent a breast augmentation and lift, something I had been considering for approximately eight years. During that time, I attended eight different consultations, always feeling that something was missing. I work in healthcare, and I’ve learned to trust my gut—and my gut kept telling me to keep looking.
While in Palm Desert visiting family, I came across CSI. I did only minimal research before booking a consultation, but I was immediately drawn to the clinic. From the moment I walked in, I felt comfortable—and after my consult, that feeling was completely validated.
The front staff, the atmosphere of the clinic, and Dr. Mo himself were exactly what I had been searching for all these years. The environment is warm, professional, and calming—never rushed, never impersonal.
A special mention must go to Aja, my coordinator. She is truly top-notch: understanding, responsive, compassionate, and an absolute pleasure to work with. From start to finish, she made the entire process seamless and reassuring. Every single person I interacted with at CSI was sincere, genuine, and deeply caring—and that matters more than words can express.
This was my first-ever surgery, which made the decision incredibly important to me on a personal level. I was fully prepared to keep searching until I found the perfect fit, and CSI was exactly that.
About a week into recovery, I found myself getting a bit stir-crazy—I’m a very active person and not used to slowing down. I half-jokingly asked if they could give me a “project” to focus on—skin care, anything. Aja immediately stepped in and arranged for a wonderful woman from their team to meet with me. She took the time to go over my skin in detail, created a personalized skincare routine, answered all of my questions, and completely shifted my mindset during recovery.
As someone who runs her own company and is constantly on the go, I realized I rarely stop to truly take care of myself. That appointment was unexpectedly grounding. I left the office feeling excited, motivated, and genuinely looking forward to caring for my skin—something I hadn’t prioritized before. It was such a thoughtful, above-and-beyond touch that truly speaks to how much this clinic cares about the whole person, not just the procedure.
I am now 8 days post-op, and I am absolutely in love—with my healing, my results, and the entire experience. One of the most important factors for me was that I did not want large implants. I am a small person, and at nearly every other consultation I attended, I was told they would not go below 400cc—something I knew was not right for my body or my vision. Dr. Mo listened. He respected my wishes. He never tried to sway me, upsell me, or override what I knew was best for myself.
That level of respect, skill, and artistry is rare.
If you are considering breast surgery—or any procedure—and want a surgeon and team who truly listen, care, and deliver exceptional results, I cannot recommend Dr. Mo and CSI highly enough. This experience exceeded every expectation I had, and I am so grateful I trusted my instincts and found them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cathy Briggs","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ4RBr-AEKgR59DC18bmapy4Maf9ZZoO4RCgYTbXDrYL74ypg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had breast augmentation done by Dr mo in April of 2025. I had massive infections and physical deformations. After three months of wound care and deformed results, Dr Mohammed Zakhire offered to repeat the surgery in July of 2025. The day after surgery I showed signs of more post op infections. They became so horrific that I had four more months of wound care. Three of those months were at EMC’s Wou nd Care Center where the wound care specialist Dr told me that Dr Mohammed Zakhireh’s blaming patients for massive deformations and disfigurements and infections on their own failure to eat the required amount of daily protein postop was “BS”. I found a new Dr who repaired one breast last month and said it was about the worst she’d ever seen. She will repair the second one in another complex surgery this month. I sincerely believe the operating room equipment at CSI is contaminated with deadly infections. Save yourself. Steer clear,","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cecilia Hamilton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUcPAMBbNRrrN_9wnRw_3epXygAK3U8tVbw9W7_1RFCIOfidkE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"With the plethora of med spas and cosmetic surgery clinics in this area, CSI stands out. Unlike others it is not ostentatious but rather focused on quality of the beautification care provided. It is there too that nestled as a rather well kept secret, Adrienne Bloom ( Bloom Aesthetics) delivers her magical touch in every single care she delivers, from lasers to fillers to botox and beyond . Adrienne is incredibly gifted and generous in the way she delivers her talents. It also comes with a hefty dose of lightheartedness and humor!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Susan Lucht","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUIqEzsAnpT0bb-Fi8rqSgYIce7O1AbJSNnwJW3Bnp9YKzJXN6FMw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've been seeing Adrienne for a couple of years now and have had various treatments. She is the BEST of the best! The results are always amazing!","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Bianca Napolitano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIuVwxNLOMBW30fv79x_q75natL5naAy7uzZ-9fF5J0eh3MRQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Claire is THE BEST 🫶🏼 I had the most wonderful experience my first time with California Cosmetics. I took advantage of their incredible Black Friday deals and purchased the necessary syringes and units for lip filler, under eye filler and Botox. Dr. B made an appearance and was wonderful to meet and delight to talk to. They immediately made me feel like apart of the CC family. Claire and I discussed what I was hoping to get done that day, as well as other treatments she felt would benefit me and the ultimate results I am looking for. [{"Name":"Rowena Sales","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocItK9vB5DEsQoL8OLxZYemc73bkuIGneJzBclzYFhYjZW3LsQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently went to SoCal Skin and Surgery for the UltraClear laser to treat several spots on my neck, and I couldn't be happier with the experience. I was expecting some discomfort, but the procedure was almost completely painless. The laser was quick, the precision was amazing and Dr. Wang was so gentle. The medical assistants went over the care instructions in detail with me to ensure a smooth recovery. My neck healed much faster than I expected, and the skin looks perfectly smooth now. If you've been putting off ultraclear laser because you're worried about pain, I highly recommend SoCal Skin and Surgery for it. I can’t wait to go back and get all the other treatments that I want done.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alan Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIQvtgUxSseCQSM23UsWQ2pDCgiAGxuV1SmVJggy0bA2PCeNQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a great experience with Dr. Azimi! The staff was super friendly, the office was clean and welcoming, and Dr. Azimi took the time to explain everything clearly. I felt really comfortable and well taken care of. Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gil Roberts","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ58Npl8clmyZBDNRgyoM-cvHhxhs8Z6O2PgtrZ0bs3safMQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"SoCal Skin and Surgery exceeded my expectations. The staff was professional, prompt, and very organized from start to finish. Communication was clear, the appointment ran on time, and the procedure itself was quick and smooth. I had a lipoma removed and the healing has gone extremely well — everything was explained clearly and I felt confident throughout the entire process. Highly recommend for anyone looking for a professional, efficient, and well-run practice.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Elise C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXz1EOcLTWDKfAYZ-lXkBxLsQ-QJXj7GmeJSjn38rHkXrLDzbAx=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Highly recommend. I’ve been to several dermatologists over the years and Dr. Wang is by far the best. They were accommodating, understanding, and incredibly thorough. So glad I found them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Reza Iranpour","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLbfIr3SiwrFCgzwQNU77oT2seP-IDUL4YTF_nBSxyTYikQAg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I used to have some skin irritation on the right side of my face when shaving, just below my cheek…
After I had a quick appointment with Dr. Wang at SoCal Skin and Surgery, she discussed the issue and gave me a few friendly creams to try. I used them for a while, but for recently I have stopped using them entirely.  This is because the skin on the right side is just as healthy as the left…
I’m really grateful to the doctor for such an efficient and effective visit, and I was very impressed by how organized and high-quality the whole staff and office were.
Thank you very much.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Grant Szymanski","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUCyq75_2BKS_IYaE04htdMi-fodpztUFFtnBQuvpTmXzjK-lw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had such a great experience here with Dr. Wang! She took the time to listen to my concerns and explained everything in detail in order to develop a treatment plan tailored to my specific needs. I appreciated the welcoming environment the staff provided and highly recommend SoCal Skin and Surgery for anyone needing assistance with their skincare!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kelsey Marasigan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX168IdHpSSxYU0KJMd8l-lA4bbYioyQ9jf58ow16niDx5Kut0v4A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Wang and her staff were very kind and she’s good at what she does! The office was nice, clean, and easy to find in the building. I went in to have a cyst drained and cleaned and was out of there in probably 30 mins.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lena Brooks-Kelly","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWhRekbtv6_zQY2_0U5UZVqFzeOXOy-f6mWhQi4-5Whu79ZK_12=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The medical team and staff at SoCal Skin and Surgery were extremely helpful and efficient during my visit! I had my first chemical peel, and the doctor and medical assistant were very detailed in considering my specific skin needs, explaining the process, and providing after-care instructions. The general atmosphere of the office was also inviting and highly clean, unlike other dermatology clinics I have been to. I would definitely recommend SoCal Skin and Surgery to anyone interested!","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"A Kay","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXUkvwWxaxJB5HB1NRxjeaB46LrUT3WoCtHTdD9eq8audrUoBs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Overrated and expensive. I was told about how great my results would look but after all was said and done things looked worse. Dr P left large gashes in his surgical cuts where i could fit my finger in them. I wish I could post the pictures but this post would probably get taken down. I was told to wait a year for results to get better. I did and it did not look better! Just lots of gaping scars. They said they would fix the problems then when i finally saw the doctor said he refused to fix anything and that he never promised anything. They probably hoped that after a year I would just give up. You do NOT get what you pay for in this place but if you have money to burn go for it! I think the Dr may have been good at what he does at one time but he probably needs to retire at this point. I wish I had a good experience here but I did not. Good luck!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Charlie Z","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGycBUFEYniKOpCdXGmvIkxNbchlBcBAYeHgkNq6Im7F-ojVQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The only reason I give two stars is because the nursing staff was polite and professional. However, the doctor himself did not deliver on his promises. Without going into too much detail, the only thing I accomplished with his procedure was numerous scars. To make matters worse, he tried to gaslight me into thinking things did look better despite seeing absolutely no differences. They also used different lighting to take the post procedure pictures to make it look \"better.\" I could have saved me about $20,000 and had the same procedure done elsewhere for a fraction of what they charged here. Buyer beware!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Wade Given","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJdOqkE1OXHdcRSE5DeKz6SG7LKnjiMqXKaU8n5UVIbNm8UZA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had the worse experience with this place. I paid for something o didn’t get. From the size of implant I wanted to the what my boobs look like after. My right implant is sticking out from underneath my skin it looks like a golf ball. I could even feel it and it’s so noticeable it’s embarrassing. I tried to tell them and they won’t even give me a solution without paying for it again to fix it. Why should I pay More out-of-pocket to fix something that they messed up. I am very disappointed I didn’t take my time to research for better options.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cee miranda","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0GRSBe-FzxiAuIk8VQYSoW1FP14tLJesZE9PYDFPtoOLnaoM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Partovi DID AN AMAZING JOB ! Definitely going to get more work in the future here , The Office and employees were great as well , Communication was Perfect they made sure I was comfortable and ready for my Big Day ! \u0026 they Did that well . Thank you Athenix \u0026 Dr. Partovi","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lETV8v2l0A2lxDMxsuyFnYbeqenGXMAsCeEMvP3jo00dRQEeUlhsm3pqjTVpEsd1YgzKiCrZo-UPBmN7XsJzoMglAe3dkbu1GM8niqoyLCawntSZoCCeS5o8CUNmRdg4RsNE9vg29TyQGzZL","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQV7_wFHHhzK1UWJHTvZJgzJFrZ7RsyrHrKYnncc0OAp7u9s84oS9I1yumsbTwpIgXIwEQOnF3q3JdQHZE4x7Xp7-XvACJSnsl6lC62NcZ37Ho80c5U7OiDJpORQwIYxOsaLi1FkF4JtWFe"],"When":"2025-10-17"},{"Name":"Maria Rendon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWm7PYDPLgQVwTCzevfkiGAc41-SvfZN5FZxnAI0tOvfZEMW_j9=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a great experience from the beginning with my coordinator Karina. She made me feel so comfortable and answered all my questions even my randoms ones through email. When you go in for your consultation you won’t meet the doctor, which I thought was weird. Once meeting Karina I was sold. She let me know how great the doctor was and how amazing his work was. I ended up getting a a mommy makeover and I love my results. I’m a very happy patient and highly recommend booking with athenix (request Karina to be your coordinator).","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"heather kuebler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJmDry-yux3mkgpIco-GZ1EXu2nTl0xJTNVN_Atk5Ar8EjA8g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Marshall and his team from Athenix of Fresno are absolutely AMAZING!!! My only regret was not finding Dr. Marshall and his knowledgeable and friendly staff sooner. I met with my Patient Care Consultant: Karina and she was absolutely magnificent . She greeted me with a warm smile and was able to offer me informative information about the process I was seeking information on. She let me know all my financing options and NOT one time did I feel pressured nor rushed to make a decision to have this procedure done. That was one of my number one priorities when choosing what office and or plastic surgeon I would be choosing to do my procedure as well as the environment, cleanliness, the plastic surgeon himself and his team. It makes it so much more personable when they take the time to know you as a person and not just as a number. Dr. Marshall is absolutely phenomenal! He was very professional, knowledgeable, upfront and honest. He listened to any concerns and or questions I had in regards to my liposuction procedure. He was very thorough when explaining what to expect before, during and after the lipo procedure was completed and even better, he explained it in a way that I could understand not in a way that one doctor would talk to another doctor. Days prior to surgery he made sure all my medications were prescribed and that I had received them without hesitation and continued to follow up with me. He went over them once again before the actual procedure and followed proper protocol in regards to any allergies that I may have had. His anesthesiologist and nurses made me feel extremely comfortable, we were able to laugh and talk which help ease the little bit of nerves I was beginning to feel prior to getting put out. Fast forward...after surgery was done, I can honeslty say I don't remember much but what I do remember was that I was in very little to no pain and I recall saying bye to my nurses and Dr. Marshall. I was given access to getting a hold of Dr.Marshall if I had any questions or concerns and Dr. Marshall got in contact with me to check up on me to see how I was feeling and how I was doing. I went back within the week to do a follow up and to check on any drainage and to change my foam and was given the most compassionate, attentive, kind hearted Nurse/Medical Assistant Alex. She made sure to listen to any questions and or concerns (I had no concerns, honestly) I had and answered them, she was also very knowledgable on what I should expect in the coming weeks of healing and gave great advice in helping me achieve my cosmetic goals. I was so ecstatic with Dr. Marshall's work on my body and the results that I continue to achieve and see daily, and Alex, Karina, the anesthesiologist and the medical staffs attentiveness in helping me achieve my cosmetic goals that I will be returning to Dr. Marshall and his team from Athenix of Fresno. Hands down, if you are looking for AMAZING results and AMAZING plastic surgeon (and I can not express enough through words how truely amazing his work is)Dr. Marshall is the plastic surgeon to go to!!! You will have absolutely no regrets.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lER7wAgZSdVCzTIFN2xr16q92mmrlRcorIxzguCniTHbmHLFfGh0xeZPpyrJE5kpqLzF0CX9aj-twHVd1ZR4_PYsQXIP0vr93gOxxWNggv0xiTptzONQkww9wvFEQmhKCwEk5ZiBQQ"],"When":"2019-5-31"},{"Name":"Anna Torres","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLXTLu3h1ka4am3jE9rJK2cdP2M7lUFPg201xmMkhjtu_qKdg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"In March 2017 I had  my breast implants removed and about six months later I had a new set of gummy implants. I ended up having 2 treatments in regards to my implants so the my could stay soft. The surgeon who operated on me no longer works there. They state took away his license. I still went back to see if I could get them replaced, because I had bought the insurance for the implants, and they still wanted to charge me $5000., More, mind you I had already paid $10,000. I now live with a botched surgery. Pain that radiates from my breast to my back. I know it has been many years, but I never thought of writing a review, I’m so disappointed in this facility. PLEASE DON’T HAVE SURGERY HERE!!!\nHorrible experience. I had to give one star but there should be minus stars on google reviews","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Karina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVqxkLDwEljM1rSMzA0Yt4IuX75tjwYBmJDMCBcCSIBFKQoqBz3=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a breast reduction 6 weeks ago with Dr. Partovi and I am very happy with my results. After having back and shoulder pain for years and being a size 36DDD I kept hesitating to get it done but then I came across Dr. Partovi and seen the work he does and all the good reviews about him I finally gave in. I had a great experience from the very beginning. Dr. Partovi did an amazing job and I am so glad I did my research and went with him. The staff at Athenix have been great especially my nurse V who I have been seeing for follow ups,  always answers my questions and provided reassurance when needed. If you are considering a breast reduction you have to go with the best and thats Dr. Partovi and his team!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Alex Menez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWLfaIYToJlJh4YLjl1oYk9HLyDhj49EPZu3dX1vP-XvpInrK0U=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"PA Krishna Patel is my "go to" for dermatology needs. I live far from the Schweiger Clinic, but I won't go to any other. Ms Patel is friendly but very capable. She asks pertinent questions and examines/looks at the affected skin. And she gives the right medication. She must be busy, though, because it's not easy to get an appointment.  However, when one is a longtime patient, like I am, you can tell the scheduler so and you would be fit in.
Or you can ask for a video visit. Anyway, it is worth waiting for Ms. PATEL.
Her Assistant, Mariah, is also very capable. Her smile is very expensive, though, still you can be sure she sends the right prescribed medication s to your right pharmacy.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chelsey Ciasulli","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJf6g-YZT8tgryUdnpQXptnSqDLi1yx2MjSdKLBdL1qEzu1pA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beyond pleased with my experience here. From the front desk, to the MA, to the dermatologist himself. Daisy at the front desk was so sweet & I could not recommend Dr Blumenstrauch more. He is very knowledgeable, kind, he listens and is collaborative with care. The world really needs more doctors like him! I found him from reviews online and needed to do so myself because he is truly amazing. The only negative reviews I saw were wait times. I personally only waited a short time to be seen but having been to multiple dermatologists and getting sub par care at best, I would have waited hours to see Dr B knowing I am well cared for. He is well worth any wait! I am so happy to have found a dermatologist I trust! Thank you :)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Diani Lo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVXZpk5gSnI-u0GIO_34sQqNje1BFZRwQtkO8zPw_2ySNaq0A6-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If you are looking for compassionate dermatology care, I strongly suggest going somewhere else.

My experience at Schweiger Dermatology Group with Julia Kwan and her team was extremely disappointing. The front desk staff did not greet or acknowledge patients, yet were quick to collect co-pays, which immediately set a cold and transactional tone. I also waited over 30 minutes past my appointment time only to have a rushed visit that lasted about 10 minutes.

During intake, the assistant repeatedly responded to my medical concerns with “that’s going to cost you more,” instead of explaining the process or addressing what I was actually asking. It felt dismissive and uncomfortable.

When Dr. Kwan entered, the appointment felt hurried and impersonal. My concerns were brushed aside, and I left feeling unheard, unsupported, and with absolutely zero resolution to the issues I came in for. Patients deserve clear communication, empathy, and professionalism, and unfortunately that was not my experience here.

I hope management takes feedback like this seriously because the culture reflected during my visit needs significant improvement.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jenny H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWCXgOImQj29g2w2ghLr-f5lsdEjp5yJp--VqId_ueHY7rQVLIYUw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We have been going to this place for a year.  In that time, they have been acquired by the Schweiger Dermatology Group and the service has severely declined.  When you call them, it is impossible to reach a live person.  Instead, you have to talk to an AI assistant.  My daughter needed a refill of her acne medication, so I called yesterday.  When the AI assistant asked me what I needed, I said “refill request,” and the AI assistant said that I had asked to cancel my next appointment and canceled that appointment.  I immediately said “customer service,” but even then, I couldn’t reach a live person and was transferred to a voicemail that said I should leave a detailed message that would be returned.  It has now been over 24 hours and no one has called me back.  My daughter is still missing her medication and we no longer have an appointment, so we will be taking our business elsewhere.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Teresa Mendez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLY6JtcX6DEwnKNFpbPUrPSVfEoMlqrDIJ3oQ3fojYtHPvM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"while i have no complaints about the service provided i have big issues with their billing.  they are trying to defraud me out of $50 & the billing department (including their escalations division) is impossible to deal with.  they keep making up reasons for this fake $50 charge.  i have submitted a complaint with the BBB & i refuse to get ripped off by this mega corporation.  look up schweiger dermatology group (they own this practice).  they are multi office & they have tons of complaints regarding false charges/double billing.  do NOT go here if you value honesty.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"S W","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK3cJAnbyQnHmTJ0W3fYYDSwX5E6I7GKWsVIBcojQF2Dmevdg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"TERRIBLE!! DO NOT WASTE YOUR MONEY!! DO NOT SEE JULIA KWAN!
My pcp wanted me to get a whole body skin check due to family history of skin cancer, I am pregnant and had a few spots of concern to look at. I made a list of 9 spots and was seen by Julia Kwan. She was very rude, inappropriate and rushed me. After 5 minutes of being in the office she asked me to hurry because she had other patients to get to. She said they typically only look at 2-3 areas of concern each appointment. I told her I was never told that when making my appointment and I paid a $70 co pay for her time and let her know she had only been in the office for 5 minutes. She did not take my concern seriously. There is a spot on my face she said could “potentially be pre-cancerous or a scab” and asked if I’ve picked it. I said no and all she recommended was to keep it lotioned for 2 weeks and if the scab doesn’t fall off then it could be pre-cancerous. NO HELP! What a waste of time and money. I do not normally write bad reviews but felt compelled to do so to hopefully save others time and money.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ifrah Sheesfarooqui","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX1I98TQWDU2aGvzK3EOJsV-XEsKuDQgfoOsxopORT2FcYFBv7qmA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've had a pleasant experience here for my daughter. The staff form the front desk to the nurses and the PAs have all been very kind and helpful. The PA Melissa was great, but she recently moved and we saw Krishna who was also exceptional. She was so patient and kind with my daughter and made her feel comfortable! Would highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mary Swetka Yu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXFcN8snrcuxR0bPKwvr7TDJRzRSSRmfGOsQaebu3ZnjbeaOQA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a relief to know that a bump on Michael’s skin was not dangerous! Dr. Chan was quick and efficient  and was able to give options for treatment. Photo show Michael with his guide dog, Devo.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESjTD5CP9MqZaJYPYh7PPabThm0CpbXbUewptyNhvh98gj6ouxjW3-qRKBcguYqH7Oryyw5Dstije8wNdUMDs97LBUwbHWKkODMb1fKvkg2Aor3eMjyyLB0sWaVfZrDvLPcOMsg"],"When":"2025-5-1"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"maria chavez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXoijks-Q64M2rXg3IGGjiH3EWsj454LuSkTV-9p8GGPdOaFMh6Wg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. White truly changed my life. After more than two years of going from doctor to doctor without answers, I had almost lost hope. I was suffering from constant migraines, jaw pain, tinnitus, heart palpitations, dizziness, heartburn, acid reflux, joint pain, extreme fatigue, and a constant desire to sleep. I was even diagnosed with vertigo, yet no one could identify the true cause of my symptoms.

From my very first visit, Dr. White took the time to listen with genuine compassion and care. He approached my case with exceptional knowledge, patience, and attention to detail. Through a thorough evaluation and BHRT (bioidentical hormone replacement therapy), he identified what others had missed. The results have been truly life-changing. I feel like a completely new person—my energy is back, my symptoms are gone, and I finally feel like myself again.

I drive four hours to receive my treatment, and it is absolutely worth it. BHRT with Dr. White has restored my quality of life, and I would make that drive again without hesitation. He never rushes appointments and truly makes you feel heard, supported, and cared for.

Dr. White combines outstanding medical expertise with genuine heart. His commitment to healing his patients and finding the root cause—not just treating symptoms—is rare. She was very thorough, informative and patient. She listened to all my concerns and answered all questions. She has great bedside manner and I am very appreciative of all her recommendations for my treatment plan. Excellent experience overall!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nasrin “Naz” Gohar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKPe3gaRj-Qa-zLMGeYBfAChaJj6L3zlH_g_nfEr8ZLWBMb-N5q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Jameson T. Loyal – A Standout in a Field That’s Lost Its Focus

I’ve seen Dr. Loyal twice now, and intentionally waited before writing this—because in the world of cosmetic dermatology, initial impressions can be misleading. Too often, the results don’t hold up once the “fluff” settles. But in this case, I can now say with full confidence: the results are exceptional, and consistent.

I didn’t walk in asking for discounts or package deals—I came in expecting one thing: a result worth the money. That’s hard to find these days. What I got was not only excellent results, but also an experience that felt precise, respectful, and refreshingly professional.

Dr. Loyal listens. He doesn’t rush. He doesn’t chat over your head with his assistant while poking your face like you're not there (a habit I find incredibly disrespectful and sadly common among his peers). Instead, he is fully focused—present in the room—and that shows in the grace and quality of his work. He clearly takes pride in what he does.

I’ve been to many top surgeons, and have tried other clinics for lasers and injectables—but I came back to Dr. Loyal, and I’m glad I did. Now I’m a loyal client—not of the clinic generally, but of Dr. Loyal specifically. He is the reason I return.

The staff is also very professional and kind, which adds to the overall experience. But make no mistake—Dr. Loyal is the real differentiator here. If you’re tired of superficial experiences and you want results backed by real attention to detail, this is your doctor.","Images":null,"When":""}]

The office staff is also very helpful.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marisol Pagan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVSBb4IL4qICwoEDZ_P1xilniOCNGl5DFkk3rft0TlEFbTqDfk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best part of this place is the location. Very easy to find lots of parking. Directions to find the office pretty self explanatory. Being someone with ptsd at times when triggered I tend to forget in the moment no matter how brief it maybe it’s distracting.

People who aren’t familiar with my condition they think the worst. They say “ first impressions “ are important. As much as that may be true it’s not for people like this. All of us are different however, we are not any different then what people deem as “ normal.

My experience inside the office was more than I could have asked for with their clinical staff. I don’t expect them all to be cheerful because, I don’t always have that face all the time. That  doesn’t mean I’m in a bad mood. I’m simply in my own moment of peace.

They all greeted me in the best professional accommodating way. Not knowing my condition as far as I know but even if they were told before hand, it only shows how much more they are in the jobs they are meant to be in their “ purpose” as I call it. That’s what you need to be when you’re in the job of your purpose.

Because when you’re not? Medical field or idk maybe a store like cvs or target just as an example. You forget that everyone else around you is just as valuable as you are and deserve the same empathy and care. Like you do your loved ones. Your mother a child friend you consider family. This is my mindset EVERYDAY despite what others assume they think they know.

So even though I met them for a brief moment no matter how professional on their end it was. To me  it made me feel much more better than they know. So I hope on days they don’t feel like their enough on their bad days. That they know they’re much more valuable to people disability or not.  Thank you","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jasen Nichols","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJSUHMPn8nAw2lEZfmQEMHm8yCFGfXf_Z3kDL_8lcHa6_KZUw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My experience was fantastic, upon entering I noticed how clean and well organized the lobby and space was , along with bright and cheerful staff, I felt very welcomed and at ease.
The practitioner was very proficient and friendly, while providing excellent service and or care..
I felt safe and would highly recommend West Dermatology to a friend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andrea Leahy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7euomdzofrbvmntlv2plHQEbFW_C8F1THGo4pg5lHVuzgB6O8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an exceptionally positive experience wit this office! I can’t say enough positive things!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michael Garcia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIDegHNR2motIXMQ8NuzE4m-u8bP_I4iIqXRCbxQ6LC0FBnyA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I just had an initial skin exam and took care of a few moles I wanted removed. My first time at a dermatologist and it was a great experience! The team was friendly, professional and checked me in super quick! I was afraid id be upsold botox but I wasn't. They offer it but no pushy sales. Thank you!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Abbey B.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLpEB95KZCKldNAXpex3bbk-gSODOLgmpoB0JXLI-NbdAdUFQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Most unprofessional group of people I’ve ever had the displeasure of dealing with- and I work in the industry. Waited over 2 months for the appointment, they want you there 15 minutes early according to texts on day of- forms say 20-30 minutes early. Why? I barely was sat 20 minutes after my actual appointment time. Everyone and I mean EVERYONE is on their phones. There’s about 4 people in the back just standing around and two/three in the front. No one is doing anything aside from one girl in the front answering calls. Asinine. Then, after I have to stand up to remind them of my presence- my chart is lost?!! How do you lose my chart?? There’s NO ONE HERE. I waited for the doctor for another 13 minutes that never came as I can here the three girls in the back talking about me (yes, I can hear you) and as I walk out of the room to dismiss myself I hear “oh there she is”.

So, you can’t see patients on time, talk about patients in common areas that can be heard behind closed doors, and everyone’s on their personal phones with patients private details on their computer screens which is violating HIPAA. go anywhere else. I’ll be calling my insurance company.

Also to update- I scheduled with a FEMALE DOCTOR not a CPN. WHY WOULD YOU SCHEDULE WITH A MALE CPN WHEN I CALLED FOR A SPECIFIC FEMALE DOCTOR????","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lyndsi Okh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXvP8ANYZDLd2-fmzrEVlp8BYfetxlmLAHN9lqaNieX1gzOCABt=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I unfortunately had a pretty bad experience here. I’ll start by saying the nurses are very nice and the only reason that I gave one star instead of zero.

I went for my normal skin check and saw a very rude doctor (who left the practice but still) and made me feel very stupid for asking questions. They forced me into getting three spots removed when it wasn’t necessary. I now have a horrible scar on my back because of their “policy” of removing three moles “just to check.” Unfortunately these spots all scarred and were not necessary to remove at all.

I was so unhappy with my experience here and now I have a brand new shiny dark scar on my back that I have to live with forever. I recommend avoiding this place at all costs.","Images":null,"When":""}]

open_hours: {"Friday":["8 AM–4 PM"],"Monday":["8 AM–5 PM"],"Saturday":["Closed"],"Sunday":["Closed"],"Thursday":["8 AM–5 PM"],"Tuesday":["8 AM–5 PM"],"Wednesday":["8 AM–4 PM"]}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Lara Rimassa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-K8QWCN-tI7jFOYyFnIuGI3lWD_CTj1edaGvFOSnCJaMp8Z3abw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Sian’s office is kind and efficient. He is a great doctor who gives solid, practical advice. I probed a question to see if he’d say I need to lose weight after reading some of the reviews here, and he was very supportive in encouraging me to focus on healthy, safe ways to reach my goals and said to not to focus on the specific pounds. I think some people don’t realize that obesity can carry serious health risks, and a responsible doctor won’t approve surgery unless it’s safe—because your life is at stake. You can DIE if your body is too fat and you go in for surgery.

Dr. Sian is straightforward and to the point, but he also makes an effort to engage in small talk and then always brings the focus back to the medical questions, which is exactly what a good doctor should do. To leave one star reviews simply because you didn’t like hearing the truth is unfair and misleading.

He comes highly referred by Dr. Storey and the VA, and my experience reflects why—he’s an excellent physician who cares about doing things the right way.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joey Rodriguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJzQek-sUHXG5OZ1zNiqro45JsavJOONmoSuYBYZxXvxBkW9A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I am writing with deep disappointment about my consultation with Dr. Kenty Sian last year. It has taken me a long time to build up the courage to even share this experience, and even longer to consider seeing another plastic surgeon because of how badly I was treated.

I came in extremely vulnerable about lifelong insecurities, seeking help for a nose that has caused me emotional pain and social isolation. Instead of feeling heard or supported, I was met with total disregard. Dr. Sian was dismissive, curt, and made me feel like I was a second-class citizen. He seemed completely uninterested in my concerns and could not wait to leave the room, treating me as if I was an inconvenience rather than a patient who deserved compassion and professionalism.

As someone living with disabilities and facing constant bullying over my appearance, it took tremendous courage to finally ask for help. The way Dr. Sian treated me only added to my anxiety and sense of worthlessness.

No patient deserves to be treated this way, especially when exposing their deepest insecurities to a medical professional. I hope this complaint helps raise awareness so that other patients are not made to feel so disregarded and disrespected.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lisa Marmolejo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjULrtGv7gq57yoDpFpwYxXwj3NcWKrsWSZ-DNPqlZmT_Doa3Po=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I met this provider some years ago, and I too at that time came out of the visit and little bummed because I didnt get what I wanted out of that visit.
Now, 2024 into 2025 after an accident landing on my chest, I was sure I ruptured my implant(s).  Again, I was referred to him, and I had the most pleasant experience with the entire staff and with Dr. Sian too.
I was able to have my procedure due to health reasons and I am forever grateful for him.
I would recommend him to anyone.  I think where people get the wrong impression is that he is straight to the point.  He is not going to tell you something that you want to hear.  He is going to tell you the facts whether you like it or not.  He is very respectful, and has a good bedside manner.
I now work in the healthcare industry and I see a lot of stuff and have a better understanding of how things work.  And I truly feel that his negative reviews just may be that they didn't get what they wanted.
With that being said, I appreciate the staff and Dr. Sian.  I will go back to him if I ever want a cosmetic procedure done.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Grace","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWJgtqO27JGdqW91N9ulpgebvmJyA7gp63L76jFySOEebuvuWkY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Every time I come to Fresno Plastic Surgery my experience is great! From the front office staff, to the medical assistants in the back. Dr Sian is a very attentive doctor and cares about your well being. He always answers my questions and I feel he looks after the best interests of his patients!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Melanie R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKh-SZjcCeVQfk6M9m42XFhLvFw5TYCQ_oKm0mYM6L0GCQChQmB=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Sian helped me out immensely. He was very honest, informative & thorough throughout the whole process. From the consultations, during procedures, to my check-up appointments. I had over 5 keloids removed from my ears with Dr. Sian & he did a FANTASTIC job. Painless procedures, my ears healed BEAUTIFULLY & he also does my steroid injections. I recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Silvia Gonzalez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUXg9VhWo4ZKa6-4tyqwxA-0DeHK0nSeVhnwryqMtON7lPMNucCmQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr Sian is a great surgeon. He removed my implants and a year later he did a lift/reduction on my breast. He listened to my concerns and what I wanted. He explained the possible outcomes. The results are exactly what I wanted. I recommend Dr Sian and his staff. He will not lie to you about what your results may be and I find that refreshing!! Every time I have talked to him he is nice, professional and quick. He listens to your concerns post op. Like I said I highly recommend him and his team.I am more than satisfied with my results.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marlene S.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL2bwWHqEINuwoqd4Zb-L5uLAOlm7O2R4wg5SsCz1fKgSrYoQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Went in for a consult - breast reduction.

I disclosed I gained 30 pounds in the last year due to depression, but was down 10 pounds already. He was very matter of fact and came off rude. Told me he would not consider me as a candidate until I lose five more pounds and that he assumed I wanted my surgery in the summer since that was most convenient for my schedule. If only I lose five more pounds, THEN he would consider filing a claim with my insurance.

I did not like his lack of empathy and his assumption that I was there to book an appointment with him. I was there for a consult. He came off very conceited and assumed a lot about me without even pretending to care.

I do not recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jennifer Mann","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL9EG0Po3-AjSsVStgVYz2fAzsW6CcbKuf1qZlkNaBvJ9B60w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Sian and all the staff at Fresno Plastic Surgery were professional, friendly and efficient. They were always on time and very informative. I knew what to expect every step of the way throughout my surgery process and on the day of surgery everyone was caring and comforting. I am so pleased with the outcoming of my Otoplasty surgery. Dr. Sian listened to exactly what I wanted.
I would highly recommend him to anyone and will use him again if I need any other work done in the future.","Images":null,"When":""}]

He has both; the Scripps Clinic in San Diego is likely the most selective Mohs program in the nation.

And, the best part is — he is a sincerely kind person who is a pleasure to get to see. Thank you Dr He! (Also this office is run very professionally and I really appreciate their excellent customer service from the receptionists to the nurses!)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"デベローマーガレット","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVRB2ri1Pg9xsGKYM2dp1ZHeGeyb9mze_-z-cmqIVws3mokfM4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"There are two doctors that have  changed my life. One is a GI surgeon that performed emergency abdominal surgery, and the other is Dr. He.

I decided to prioritize anti-aging when I turned 28, and began seeing cosmetic dermatologists regularly for botox, filler, and the occasional laser treatment. While they were all very well-known, and competent, not one was able to accomplish the difference with just one treatment that Dr. He has managed on ALL: lasers, threads, filler, Thermage, Morpheus, Kybella...

Anti-Aging: Dr. He is a master with threads and filler. Particularly with threads, his understanding of facial structure and vectors allows him to accomplish miracles I would think impossible without surgery, or without an absurdly large budget. He has sharpened my jawline, provided lift in my forehead to improve eyelid sagging, removed a double chin, and molded my face into a more triangular shape that I have only seen in LA fashion models (certainly not a younger me).

Rosacea: My rosacea used to be so awful that I used two concealers under foundation. Now on the days that I don't go into the office I run around outside wearing no makeup at all.

Surgery Scars: A major GI surgery a few years ago left a huge ugly scar down my abdomen. Post-laser treatment it is now only a few inches long, and barely noticeable. You can imagine the first appointment I booked after my surgery this year.

Rash/Acne: I have been hospitalized twice for infected dermatitis that was very difficult for my former dermatologists to manage. Dr. He has prevented elongated outbreaks, and was able to do so even during the height of COVID (sometimes even working off of grainy photos). As for acne, I wish my migraines could be kept under better control.

This is only a small sample of what he has done for me. After the last 4 years, I do not think I would EVER go to anyone else with any cosmetic OR medical dermatologic issue. Even on most other general medical concerns, I will ask him before I ask any other doctor precisely because the combination of his expertise, knowledge, and compassion is not easily met with, in any field.

But for the reader, perhaps the most salient point is that I look BETTER than I did at 28, and I just turned 37.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Aaron Peterson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLu-mJM7hlA7rlg4AZ1sIMH8ORwLPBm-kFgnSPGV6jwNImS3g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"He cured my failure extremely well with excellent failure management. Kathleen Welsh is a perfectionist and a true artist!

Dr Welsh knows my style (she knows I don't want to look "over done") and gives (on request) great advice for what I really need (instead of what I thought I needed) often saving me $$.  I trust her completely (based on 2 decades of stellar results)!

I was introduced to Dr Welsh by a product rep friend (it's part of her job to know everybody in the industry) as a wonderful person and excellent doctor.  I have always been glad of every visit!

Recently I tried her cleansing pads while camping - who knew you could get refreshed glowing skin w/out water?  I'm one of those people who breaks out if I miss cleansing morning or night, so these are little gems.

Honestly, I cannot lavish enough praise on Dr Welsh (and her staff) for excellent care and great results!  I'm pretty sure Dr Welsh really does love skin!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Iwona Hohnloser","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX1gzSrBx6gJZihRypdcLPcf3FoL4NctspDJ4xbwo4G_LuYaZ4Z=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been going to Dr. Welsh for few years now. I had been looking for a dermatologist for botox and fillers throughout the Bay Area and Europe. I was so happy to finally find Dr. Welsh! She is an amazing "artist " with the syringe -- never makes me look like I had something done. My own children, husband, and sisters never noticed that I had gotten "work done" to my face. I always get compliments on how great and young I look. Equally as important, Dr. Welsh is extremely thoughtful with how she practices. She always takes her time to listen to what I am looking for, and only suggests alternatives when they are best suited for the results I want. Never has she pushed anything on me like some other doctors have.
Most importantly, I am so fortunate to have been her patient. I had been seeing other dermatologists while abroad, but when I returned to the Bay Area and visited Dr. Welsh for a botox treatment, she identified that I had an extremely early stage melanoma, so early that other physicians had not identified it or been concerned. I insisted that it was nothing, as I had had the mole for years. Dr. Welsh insisted on a biopsy - thank God !  She was incredibly caring as she gave me the news, and reassured me that everything would be okay given my early stage diagnosis. She not only referred me to the top specialists in the area for the Mohs surgery, but she continued to followed up with me throughout my treatment.
Dr. Welsh is simply is one of the best, most caring doctors I have ever had. I have no words to describe how thankful I am to her.
P.s. I finally told my husband that that I was getting Botox and that Dr. Welsh was the one that discovered the melanoma. While he is pretty anti-cosmetic procedures, my hubby has now given me a full OK for botox...as long as I will continue to see Dr. Welsh :-)))","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Katina DiGiovanna","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX-lLNt9dDPpMELWsQ4ZcJ5TOohnDNvcu6UxyiW1sdsdIhpisDa=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been using Dr Kathleen Welsh for over 15 years and highly recommend her. Do NOT trust this incompetent dermatologist with your skin!
I beg you, please, DO NOT go to this terrible doctor for your skin problems. Seeing him was the worst decision of my life, and it completely ruined my skin.
In June 2024, I developed contact dermatitis and made the mistake of seeing this doctor. If I could turn back time, I would never have gone to him, no matter how desperate I was. There were already tons of bad reviews about him, but since he was the only one available quickly, I took the risk—and I regret it every single day.

Why is he incompetent?
1️⃣  Reckless treatment for sensitive skin
- If you have very sensitive skin, a competent doctor would usually recommend products for sensitive skin or advise you to stop using anything until your skin improves. But instead, this doctor gave me a bunch of product samples without considering my skin condition.
- I trusted him and used the products he gave me—my skin had a severe reaction, and it has never recovered since. I am still undergoing treatment at a major hospital, and I have spent an enormous amount of money trying to fix what he did to my skin.

2️⃣  Misdiagnosis and harmful advice
- After experiencing a severe reaction from his recommended product, my skin started peeling. When I went back to him, he completely misdiagnosed the issue and told me my skin was just very dry and that I needed to keep trying different products.
- I followed his advice and kept trying new products, but my skin only became more and more sensitive until it refused to tolerate ANY products at all.
- Eventually, I saw another dermatologist—they immediately recognized that my skin issue was simply my sunscreen pilling and told me to stop using all products. If only I had seen a real expert sooner!

This doctor destroyed my skin, and I will never be able to go back to how it was before. Can you imagine? As a woman, not being able to wear makeup ever again? I haven’t been able to apply any moisturizer or sunscreen for 7 months. I don’t even know if I’ll ever be able to wear makeup again.

I am beyond devastated. Because of him, I have spent so much money, suffered mentally, and have been battling depression since June 2024. Who is going to take responsibility for this? I want to sue him for ruining my life.

🚨 If you care about your skin, especially as a woman, STAY AWAY from this doctor. 🚨
I am warning you—DO NOT make the same mistake I did.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQQJvqr9Jh5-C_YGO3L6vcqiHVXmREwFwklCzvSQBkqyYiYs7uDxK80X7dZEn0uW5Ls-rpSV3YTrQcyNdQmbAg_BzAv0S3X5WWSiwM3nRuyTRCfd25GglzSXBWnu3NudIB7xFq3"],"When":"2025-2-3"},{"Name":"J California","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLAyb9V14xhkmKM5Cr_hwBSkc7xANskF6KwBtcucCoMdLuYgw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"My experience at the California Skin Institute with Dr. Anhalt was unfortunately very disappointing. The photo shows the result of two attempts of Botox over 5 appointments, it looks asymmetric and incomplete. Dr. Anhalt has not disinfected the skin area nor took time to assess my facial movements and believes I am resistant to Botox (which was never a thing in the 7 years before at other dermatologists).
I did not feel comfortable visiting the practice, as my subjective impression was that it was messy and rundown. The front office was friendly but not knowledgeable about their cosmetic treatments which made it consistently hard to make appointments. A frustrating and very costly experience for unfortunately a worse look than before.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lERg3w5ex6MtUZClPS9PPj0kWZGTZwzvkhL17IjBqN14xEDJD9d9wUOn4HdemCVjHxvoxWuOJ7v8ruE6JnszW2DJ5aUfb9wRvZu9PErDtbpTaCebvrdNbIuOiRvrz6hnNQfT4PTt"],"When":"2024-9-24"},{"Name":"Gus Topanga","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgyC8wVQsofYKuc6XvVtLU76-xfT3Lj_Sq71_gy9k06K7dYOzQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Rushes appts, and he admitted that he's more for medical dermatology rather than skincare/cosmetic even though the website says that he does cosmetic. The front desk staff are lovely and they have TONS of free sample items. They told me to take as much as I wanted which was great because they have samples of some pricier items too.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jon Crawford","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWQCzk2ihThMwQzraS9LYOEZ0G7X0lSNpnMBvH20oH20Xtbhn6ZHw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best in the business. I have a sense of relief and care now.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Judith ramirez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL8iKTygUJ8QhNYKVkxktzBNdf8kKoZIK3ffv6lanPtNscCFA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I thought I was done with this horrible unprofessional place but I guess I was wrong. As soon as I got to the facility I was checked in rather quickly and I thought it would be a pretty straight forward process. I was completely wrong . The provider who saw me “K.Smith” was unprofessional. As soon as she walked in she stated she did not want to be at work because of was the day after Halloween. I just laughed it off because quite frankly I didn’t care . I just wanted to get my work done and leave . Remember I came in for a biopsy !!!! Well unfortunately that wasn’t done and I was in and out of that place in less than 5 min. I had told the provider my concerns and how skin cancer runs in my family, I’ve been in pain for months and still am  and how important this biopsy was for me. I was beyond upset because not only did she NOT listen to my concerns but I had wasted a day of work and drove a hour all for what? $1 worth of lotion ? The experience was so horrible I even spoke to the supervisor who said I wouldn’t be billed . I thought that was the end of this horrible place but I was wrong . Fast forward 4 months later I get a call from the billing department saying I owe $39.93 for my visit with the dermatologist. I immediately tired to dispute it but was told that since technically I was “seen” that’s what the bill was for .I would also like to add that the supervisor did offer me the option to see someone else in this facility but for what ? So my time could be wasted again ? This whole place is a absolute joke save your time and money and just go elsewhere. Truly.

Give Alisa & all Dr. Younai staff bows for consummate professionaiism, compassion and patient confidence.

This was my first surgery in decades and I was utterly impressed with this medical practice-- having 'rolled the dice' without any prior personal recommendation. Alisa and  were first to return my calls inquiring about dupuytrins contracture surgery.

And now this month, I. Just had complex hand surgery at Dr Younai's and from start to finish couldn't be happier with overall reception, follow-ups, meticulous reminders & follow up checks.

Alisa assisted Dr. Younai with removing my stitches (over 30 from 5 incisions) and she showed upbeat skill and sensitivity to the patient's pain.

She also had professional answers regarding healing and arnica products.

And she even motivated me to get a super helpful aloe vera real leaf/frond from Whole Foods all this highly approved by the surgeon.

Because of this unified help from start to finish-- my hand is healing almost twice as fast as others with the same condition.

Have to say I have restored confidence in the medical profession and overall mankind I can say.

Thanks Dr. Younai, Elisa and the superb team for taking care of me!","Images":null,"When":""}]

I’m truly disappointed with my experience working with DR.HC Cosmetic Lab. As a business owner, I expected professionalism and quality, but what I received fell far short.

After sending my logo for mock-ups, I was told it didn’t meet their standards, yet no effort was made to offer a proper solution. When I simplified the logo per their request, they turned around and tried to charge me again for what they called a “new” project—despite already paying $200 upfront for their services.

The mock-ups provided were subpar and didn’t reflect the professional quality I was looking for. Instead of addressing the issues and making it right, they refused to adjust the designs without more fees. Worse, they have a strict no-refund policy, leaving me stuck with results I wasn’t happy with and no way to recoup my investment.

Any reputable company should prioritize customer satisfaction and be flexible enough to correct their mistakes without charging their clients extra. It’s clear that DR.HC Cosmetic Lab is more interested in taking your money than delivering quality results.

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Stefanie Barnhart","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLy7s_AMhPM9aofmEshmvYeeNdCYCE9fVK_U0b3bIpkN7FqAA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"While there were a few minor frustrations, overall my experience was good. As it seems like MCC is a relatively newer company, it looks like they are still getting some of the kinks worked out of the process. My coordinator was not as responsive as I would have liked, but as a previous MBC patient, I was able to reach out to others who were able to quickly answer my questions.

Before I signed up for my surgery package, I was sent an email stating that all packages included 2 hyperbaric treatments, however, when the nurse told me I would benefit from them, I was told that it would be extra $. Which I did pay, however, I don't think there should be advertised sessions included if that is not actually the case or if there is "fine print" with stipulations.

The transportation from the airport to the hotel was smooth. We waited about 30 minutes, once we got to the hotel we filled out paperwork and waited to be checked in to our rooms. While waiting we were able to order a meal from their restaurant (which is delicious and healthy)
We had a large group for pre-op testing so it did take a few hours but it was ran very well. When it came time for surgery day, I was told my surgery would be at 3pm. However, it seemed like my doctor was running a bit late. Which is absolutely OK, I wish the communication with the patient was a bit better. I waited a couple hours before anyone came in to update me, and that is when they told me that he should be in within 30 minutes.

My doctor was Navarro, and he was incredible. When he arrived he marked me, asked if I was ready and had me in the O.R. within 15 minutes. I am now 7 weeks post op and I have healed amazingly.  Everyone that I have seen for post op care just raves about how amazing my incisions look.

Some of the nurses are absolutely amazing, and some of them leave much to be desired. While in the hospital, having over 8 feet of incisions,  one nurse came in and told me I needed to get up and walk, then turned around and walked out. I physically couldn't maneuver to get out of the bed by myself  at that point and he didn't even try to help me. All of my other nurses were amazing.

After being discharged to the hotel, I was able to rest a bit better, and was able to manage the pain well with the medications given, it would have been nice to be given a copy of the operative report during the stay for future reference.

The nurse who checked in on me daily was amazing, she even washed my faja while I was showering and answered all of my questions as she was checking all the incisions. We had to communicate through translation apps but it worked great.

Overall,  my experience was a good one, while there were a few hiccups along the way, I have no doubt that MCC will continue to improve with time!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"James Domino","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJu0z5Vaa4YujRPeZ44BdFY2WreP7ReRpEpcgXz-jrUZOhfug=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"My advice would be to run far far away from Mexico Cosmetic center and save your money for someone in the states. I am now over 3 weeks post op, I have had to mis several days of work due to continued swelling in my face, neck and eyes that has not subsided. I have been to the emergency department twice, urgent care once, and my primary care twice. I am now being forced to see an ophthalmologist to see what is wrong with my eyes, the whites of my eyes are bulging out and are turning yellow. I had to file FMLA which needs to be filled out, my primary care as well as the Emergency doctors have requested the surgeons (Dr Navarro) cooperation, he has ignored all calls and requests. At this point I'm preparing to file a lawsuit for malpractice.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kim Jones","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV72jva9i2dvB-lNgBNeAvR4Gpq8omLmaX0jGk8sLKr7rttgUN-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My experience was very good starting with questionnaire to at home care. Dr Guerrero was great.   Dr Raul and Dr Guerrero were the best.  Dr Guerrero explained everything in a way to understand and came to the hotel to check on me.  Both Drs either texted or called to check on me when I came home.   I would go back to MCC for any other cosmetic surgeries.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Melissa Bravo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLvE2H1cEWDERyZn0CeY_rV1A6IXZ01X1XEx2v15DYJelW_mQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Coordinator was no help at all, there sister clinic was wonerful so i thought I would go with the same company. Quoted one price on sept 4 and than a higher price sept 15. She said prices went up sept 1. Even over the phone the emails didnt match our conversation.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Brandi Davison","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI4UJRGthDynbnaBumZSneTyRmkfKb6KUCTUCVUj5fu2fLzhg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I did extensive research before I decided on MCC. I was scheduled for a circular tummy tuck, breast implants, 360 degree lipo, an arm lift and a BBL. I was told if I brought a companion with me that they would have to find their own transportation back and forth to the hospital and they they wouldn't be allowed to see me till the day after surgery and that would be on a limited basis, I was very disappointed when I arrived to learn that was not the case. I flew in to San Diego and was told I would be met at the airport, I was given a number to call when I arrived to find out where to meet my driver. I ended up having to wait at the airport for 3 + hours before being picked up. At the hotel the next morning when I went down to be picked up I was told that it was actually going to be an hour later. Once I got to the hospital I sat in the waiting room for at least an hour before I was taken to my room. Once in my room they gave me some medication to help me relax because I was so nervous. I ended up falling asleep and woke up an hour after my surgery was supposed to start and I had still never seen the dr. I asked what was going on and was told he had gotten delayed in another hospital, I didn't really understand this since I had been told I was his only patient that day but after many hours was finally told it was at another hospital. About 8 PM DR Navarro finally came to my room, he said he was still willing to do the surgery that night but he believed i may need blood and the blood bank was closed so he wouldn't be able to do all of the surgery I had paid for. He said if I waited till the next day when he had access to blood he could do then all. I opted to wait till the next day. The next morning I was taken in for surgery and when I came out I was told I had lost a lot of blood and needed a transfusion. While I was in surgery the hospital moved me to another room, I had been told I was staying in that room so I had not packed up my things, when they moved me they left some of my things in the room,  I asked about it they said it had been thrown away, the hospital did end up reimbursing me for it. One of my surgical drains leaked the entire time I had it and they had to keep changing all of my bandages and bedding because of it. A few days later when the dr finally came to see me i told him the issue and he said he would come and remove it the next day. The following day when I was Once again soaked I asked the nurse to find out when he was going to be there, they just kept saying they couldn't get a hold of him, they changed all of my bandages and I laid in bed all day trying not to move hoping it would stop it from leaking, that did not work. I told the nurse that I was soaked again and they basically said I needed to wait for the dr and hopefully he would be there that night. He never showed up and they made me sit in soaking wet bandages and wet bedding all night. The next day I was being discharged and they came to help me get ready and I had to remind them again I was waiting for the dr to remove the drain, his assistant finally removed it 30 minutes before I was discharged. I had to constantly ask for my pain meds and every time I had to ask multiple times to get them. The whole thing was a terrible experience and I'm very unhappy with my results. I'm still having complications a year later and have to have everything they did fixed. I had to purchase travel insurance incase something happened such as needing blood, the insurance company should reimburse me, i couldn't get MCC to give me the proper documentation that the insurance company requires, they kept saying they can't get it from the hospital and that the DR refused to release it, the insurance company finally reimbursed me without the documentation. I've been told that multiple patients of MCC that had surgery by DR Navarro have come back unsatisfied and with complications and MCC is doing nothing about it. I want back the $20,000 this has cost me so I can get the mess they made fixed. Don't let them scar you for life too.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Natasha Blakely","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLHkzveDtYTGBLkPWHdSjW_38r6dZi4R685nr7Kh5tyKtXCWQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This is the worst experience I have ever had medically. I came here because they did my bariatric surgery and it was awesome. Their cosmetic surgery team leaves A LOT to be desired.  They restrict your access to food then do not supply you with food.  I had to practically beg for food. They don't tell you why they don't have food service either,  they just never show up.  They were more than 3 hours late taking me to surgery and never communicated why until I contacted the director. From the moment I walked in, the office felt modern, clean, and welcoming. The staff was professional and genuinely caring. Dr. Lovik took the time to explain everything clearly, showed me my X-rays, and walked me through my options without pressure.

What really stood out to me was the attention to detail and how much he truly cares about his patients. You are not rushed, and you feel heard. It is rare to find a dentist in Clovis who combines skill, technology, and compassion at this level.
